DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Your Discord application's public key for verifying interaction signatures. Find it in Discord Developer Portal > Your App > General Information > Public Key.

DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN.description: Your Discord bot token for authentication. Generate it in Discord Developer Portal > Your App > Bot > Reset Token.

DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID.description: Your Discord application's ID (also called Client ID). Find it in Discord Developer Portal > Your App > General Information > Application ID.

FIRELA_BOT_API_KEY.description: Your Firela Bot API key for accessing the relay service. Get it from https://firela.io/dashboard after signing up.
